/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/huffman_console.dir/huffman/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/huffman_console.dir/huffman/Funciones/bitstream.cpp.o CMakeFiles/huffman_console.dir/huffman/Funciones/frequency_table.cpp.o CMakeFiles/huffman_console.dir/huffman/Funciones/huffman_tree.cpp.o CMakeFiles/huffman_console.dir/huffman/Funciones/encoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/huffman_console.dir/huffman/Funciones/decoder.cpp.o -o huffman_console
